scenarios.title: Triage failed authentication activity
success_criteria: Sets and records an appropriate time range
Identifies source and affected host fields
Verifies a representative event against event.original

scenarios.title: Investigate denied router or firewall traffic
success_criteria: Narrows results using source or destination fields
Identifies the action, protocol, and endpoint tuple
Verifies a representative event against event.original

scenarios.title: Diagnose a parser or dead-letter event
success_criteria: Identifies the source dataset and failed stage
Explains why empty results and ingestion failure differ

scenarios.title: Investigate an application failure
success_criteria: Narrows results by service or host
Finds the earliest relevant failure in the incident window
Records evidence fields without direct server access
